Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ghostwind Hall]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Ghostwind Hall is a location Lindon recently finished working on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Ghostwind Hall is a location where Lindon materialized.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos has spent months inside Ghostwind Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Ghostwind Hall contains a cycling room where Yerin practices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Ghostwind Hall is a location where Orthos' training can be heard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Ghostwind Hall is a location where the air boiled when an alarm sounded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ghostwind Hall is a location accessible via a portal inside a doorway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy strode back into Ghostwind Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin was in Ghostwind Hall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
